summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MineOS web-based desktop operating system. Backend APIs working well (9/10 tests passed). Frontend desktop interface fully functional with all applications working: Terminal, Calculator, File Manager, Text Editor, Task Manager, Settings. Window management, taskbar, start menu, and context menu all working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for file creation
minor_bugs.impact: File creation works but wrong HTTP status code

minor_bugs.issue: Calculator display not showing result clearly in automated test
minor_bugs.note: Calculator interface and buttons work, may be display update timing issue

passed_tests: Desktop loads with wallpaper and Obsidian Glass theme
All desktop icons present (Terminal, Files, Text Editor, Calculator, Browser, Task Manager, Settings)
Taskbar shows running apps and system tray with time
Start menu opens from hexagon button
Double-clicking desktop icons opens corresponding windows
Window management working - multiple windows open simultaneously
Taskbar shows running apps and clicking focuses windows
Terminal commands working (help, whoami, ls, date)
File Manager shows folders (Documents, Pictures, Music, Downloads)
Text Editor opens with text area for typing
Task Manager shows running processes with memory usage and End buttons
Settings opens with sidebar (Display, Appearance, Sound, Notifications, About)
Right-click context menu appears on desktop
Backend API /api/ returns MineOS API message
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix file creation API to return status 201 instead of 200. Investigate calculator display update timing for automated testing.
